profile.name: Dilroop Singh
profile.role: Senior Mobile Application Developer focused on Android, Kotlin Multiplatform, Jetpack Compose, and delivery at scale.
profile.availability: Senior mobile roles and contract opportunities
profile.tagline: Senior mobile developer with 10+ years of experience building scalable Android, Flutter, and cross-platform products with strong architecture, CI/CD, and UX discipline.
summary: I build high-quality mobile products with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, KMM, Flutter, and modern architectural patterns.
My work usually sits at the intersection of product delivery, architecture, performance, and release reliability.
I have led rewrites, cross-platform feature delivery, white-label pipelines, analytics instrumentation, and architecture decisions across teams working asynchronously.

projects.name: OrderMeal Android Rewrite and Release Pipeline
projects.summary: Led the rewrite of a legacy Android app to Jetpack Compose while also owning release automation across multiple white-label clients.
projects.impact: Modernised the UI layer, established architecture patterns for the team, and enabled reliable repeatable releases through GitHub Actions.
details: Led the Android rewrite from legacy UI to Jetpack Compose.
Owned release automation for multiple white-label client apps.
Used ADRs and cross-team technical discussion to guide architecture.

projects.name: Octopus Energy KMM Shared Feature Platform
projects.summary: Delivered Kotlin Multiplatform features that shared business logic across Android and iOS without disrupting white-label clients.
projects.impact: Improved cross-platform delivery speed while protecting client-specific releases through stronger CI/CD pipelines.
details: Shared business logic between Android and iOS using Kotlin Multiplatform.
Built Compose UI with MVVM, StateFlow, and sealed classes.
Protected white-label client flows with stronger CI/CD pipelines.

projects.name: ANZ Open Banking in goMoney
projects.summary: Built Open Banking data-sharing features as the sole Android developer working in the goMoney app codebase.
projects.impact: Delivered production-grade features for an app used by more than one million users, with analytics, testing support, and release involvement.
details: Implemented Open Banking data-sharing features as the sole Android developer on the workstream.
Added Adobe Analytics instrumentation and stronger test mocks.
Supported releases and resolved production issues in a high-scale app.

projects.name: Foodstuffs Order Picking Platform
projects.summary: Led architecture and development for the online order-picking solution used across New World and PAK’nSAVE stores.
projects.impact: Shipped and maintained Android and Flutter apps plus supporting libraries and device tooling for operations at scale.
details: Architected a store operations workflow used across 70+ supermarket locations.
Maintained Android and Flutter apps with analytics and wireframing input.
Built shared libraries and a custom Android launcher for managed work devices.

experience.summary: Leading development of restaurant and customer apps in Kotlin and Flutter, while driving architecture decisions and team delivery across time zones.
achievements: Lead development of restaurant and customer apps in Kotlin and Flutter.
Contributed to technical architecture through ADRs and cross-team discussions.
Led a team of five mostly senior developers across NZT and IST.
Led the full rewrite of a legacy Android app to Jetpack Compose and established new architecture patterns adopted across the team.
Designed and owned the GitHub Actions release pipeline for reliable repeatable multi-client releases.

experience.summary: Delivered Kotlin Multiplatform features, Compose UI, and CI/CD improvements across Android and iOS-facing work in a white-label environment.
achievements: Led development of Kotlin Multiplatform Mobile features that enabled shared business logic across Android and iOS.
Delivered cross-platform features while protecting white-label clients through robust CI/CD test pipelines.
Built Jetpack Compose UI with MVVM, StateFlow, and sealed classes for robust state management.
Improved maintainability by integrating Hilt and improving dependency structure.
Collaborated asynchronously with UK and India teams on high-impact features.
Contributed to architecture decisions through ADRs and cross-team discussion.
Provided occasional SwiftUI support for iOS feature parity.

experience.summary: Worked as the sole Android developer for Open Banking data-sharing features inside the goMoney app.
achievements: Implemented Open Banking data-sharing features in the ANZ goMoney app used by 1M+ users.
Improved user experience through detailed behaviour implementation and UI refinement.
Integrated Adobe Analytics to capture meaningful usage insights using MVVM patterns.
Added test mocks with the in-house Mockifer library to improve test reliability.
Participated in Agile ceremonies and contributed to platform-wide ADRs.
Supported releases and resolved production issues.

experience.summary: Led architecture and development of online order-picking solutions and supporting mobile platform work across supermarket operations.
achievements: Led development and architecture for the online order-picking solution used across 70+ New World and PAK’nSAVE stores.
Maintained Android and Flutter apps, including UI/UX wireframing and analytics integration.
Built reliable async operations using Kotlin Coroutines, Dart Futures, and JavaScript Promises.
Developed internal Maven, Gradle, and Dart libraries for shared functionality.
Built a custom Android system launcher for dedicated work devices deployed via MDM.
Implemented REST and OData APIs plus SAP UI5 features in Typescript and JavaScript.
Practiced TDD with unit and integration tests using Mockito.

experience.summary: Contributed part-time to mobile and web projects while broadening backend and hybrid app development skills.
achievements: Learned Django backend development and the Ionic framework while contributing to mobile and web projects.

details: Formal computing study completed in New Zealand with focus on software development foundations.
Focused on artificial intelligence, machine learning, robotics, image processing, and neural networks.

education.qualification: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
details: Built core engineering and computer science fundamentals.
This was the period where Android became the main focus and the first apps were built.
